payload.description:
Feature: Model performance frontier supports TactusScore
  Scenario: TactusScore model variants update embedded default_model
    Given a score YAML uses class TactusScore with code containing default_model "openai/gpt-5.4-nano"
    When frontier variants are planned with a candidate model provider/name
    Then the variant YAML updates the embedded default_model directive deterministically
    And preserves the surrounding Tactus code

  Scenario: TactusScore parameter variants flow to runtime controls
    Given a TactusScore variant sets reasoning_effort or verbosity at the score YAML root
    When the score executes its Tactus runtime
    Then TactusRuntime receives those controls so ClassifyProcedure LLMModel calls forward them to the backend

  Scenario: Existing LangGraphScore variants still update root model fields
    Given a LangGraphScore YAML uses root model_provider/model_name fields
    When frontier variants are planned
    Then the existing root-field behavior is preserved
payload.title: story Support TactusScore in model performance frontier
